content: Nelle vicinanze c'erano sei vasi di pietra usati dagli ebrei per il lavaggio cerimoniale, ciascuno contenente dai venti ai trenta galloni.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by carlosalberto (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:Nearby were six stone jars used by the Jews for ceremonial washing, each containing twenty to thirty gallons
